overall.description: A nighttime gameplay sequence from GTA V showing a character in a yellow jacket running through a rainy residential neighborhood. The clip begins with a first-person perspective walking along a sidewalk, transitions to third-person as the character crosses a wet intersection with traffic, then continues running past palm trees and suburban houses.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with white picket fence

events.description: white SUV drives past on the left as the camera approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a white picket fence, approaching a street intersection

entered.detail: tall white wooden fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
large palm tree trunk with textured bark on the left side
dark colored trash receptacles near the fence
blue postal mailbox on the sidewalk edge
bright yellow fire hydrant near the curb

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking along a wet residential sidewalk at night. A white picket fence runs along the right side while palm trees line the left. The camera passes a blue mailbox and yellow fire hydrant while approaching an intersection, with a white SUV driving past on the left.

events.description: camera perspective switches to third-person revealing character in yellow jacket, exiting sidewalk into open intersection
character crosses the wet asphalt intersection while cars pass through
character transitions from walking to running while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: character in yellow jacket runs across the wet intersection, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving through the intersection from left to right
red pickup truck approaching the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: wide wet asphalt road with reflective surface from rain
street sign indicating Vinewood Blvd visible in the distance
white painted lines marking pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the perspective shifts to third-person, revealing a character in a yellow jacket. The character runs across the wet asphalt, navigating between a white SUV and other traffic. Street lights and car headlights illuminate the rainy night, with a Vinewood Blvd sign visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with palm trees and houses

events.description: character steps onto the opposite sidewalk, entering a residential area with houses and lawns
camera passes close to overhanging tree branches that briefly obscure the view

agents.ego_description: character runs steadily along the residential sidewalk, passing houses with lit windows and palm trees

entered.detail: house with illuminated windows and covered porch area
strip of green grass between sidewalk and street
real estate sign posted in front yard of house
blue barrier fence visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along a residential sidewalk lined with palm trees and houses with warm lights glowing from windows. The camera passes a for-sale sign and trash bins while maintaining a steady pace. Overhanging tree branches briefly obscure the view as the character moves deeper into the neighborhood, with street lamps casting pools of light on the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy residential neighborhood at night, transitioning from an intimate first-person walk to a wide third-person pursuit. It begins from a first-person perspective moving along a wet sidewalk past a white picket fence, a blue mailbox, and a yellow fire hydrant. As the camera reaches an intersection, the perspective shifts to third-person to reveal a character in a yellow jacket running across the glistening asphalt amidst the glow of street lights and passing traffic. The scene then expands as the character continues sprinting past palm trees and suburban houses with warm interior lights, passing a for-sale sign and trash bins. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the neighborhood, weaving under overhanging tree branches as street lamps cast rhythmic pools of light across the damp pavement.
